tickets.title: Multi-student assignment targeting
tickets.description: US-44: Teacher can assign the same homework to multiple students at once. Add student selector to assignment creation form, create assignment_targets join table.

tickets.title: Assignment templates
tickets.description: US-45: Teacher can save and reuse assignment templates. Store templates in a new templates table, add template picker to assignment creation form.

tickets.title: Media attachments on assignments
tickets.description: US-46: Attach videos, sheet music, and tablature to assignments. Requires Supabase Storage bucket setup — needs human configuration.

tickets.title: Request redo on submissions
tickets.description: US-47: Teacher can request a redo on a submission instead of just reviewing. Add 'redo' status to submissions, add Request Redo button alongside Review.

tickets.title: Student progress history view
tickets.description: US-48: Teacher can view a student's assignment history and progress over time. Add student profile/detail page showing submission timeline, completion rates, feedback history.

tickets.title: Practice streak and progress stats
tickets.description: US-51: Student sees streak (consecutive days practiced) and progress stats on dashboard. Calculate from submission timestamps, show streak counter and completion percentage.

tickets.title: Embedded video player for assignments
tickets.description: US-49: Student can watch embedded tutorial videos in assignment detail. Support YouTube/Vimeo URL parsing and iframe embedding. Depends on HMS-003 for uploaded videos.

tickets.title: Mobile responsive layout
tickets.description: US-75: App works comfortably on mobile with responsive layout. Single-column views, touch-friendly buttons, responsive nav, mobile-optimized schedule/calendar views.

tickets.title: In-app messaging system
tickets.description: US-71, US-72, US-62: Messaging between teacher, student, and parent. Requires new messages table with RLS policies — needs human review for security.

tickets.title: Parent role and dashboard
tickets.description: US-58-64: Parent can view child's assignments, book lessons, see progress, manage billing. Requires auth/role changes, new DB tables (student_guardians), RLS policies.

tickets.title: Admin role and dashboard
tickets.description: US-65-70: Admin can manage teachers, enroll students, view school-wide metrics, manage schedules, send announcements, generate reports. Requires auth/role changes, RLS policies.

tickets.title: Band management
tickets.description: US-73-74: Teacher manages band roster and rehearsal schedule, student sees band + private lessons together. Requires new tables, RLS policies.

tickets.title: Young student simplified view
tickets.description: US-55-57: Young students see simplified dashboard with one practice task, big buttons, star rewards, and visual streak calendar. Frontend-only based on existing data.

tickets.title: Student badges and achievements
tickets.description: US-53: Students earn badges for milestones (10 assignments completed, 30-day streak). Calculate from existing submission data, display on profile.

tickets.title: Video recording in-app
tickets.description: US-52: Student can record practice video directly in app and attach to submission. Requires Supabase Storage + media recording API — needs human setup.

tickets.title: Sheet music mobile viewer
tickets.description: US-50: Mobile-friendly sheet music viewer with zoom and pan. Depends on HMS-003 (media attachments) being completed first.

tickets.title: Multi-tenant organization architecture
tickets.description: MVP Plan: Migrate from simple profiles+teacher_student_links to organizations+memberships+invites multi-tenant model. Major DB migration + auth flow changes — requires human review.

tickets.title: Billing placeholder (plan selection)
tickets.description: MVP Plan: Capture org plan selection (solo/studio/school). Stripe integration placeholder. Requires Stripe setup — needs human configuration.
